name: Ngao Asoke
overview: Monthai Mahataweit the a young man of 18 years old is handsome and amazing in every way whether it’s education or his family’s name. He is also the only son of a wealthy official Jao Khun Mahat and Khun Ying (Lady) Tap Tim. He is the lover of Viyada Hiranwat a pretty young lady who is approved by Khun Ying Tap Tim because she is equal in rank and status she also wants to them to get engaged before Monthai goes to school overseas.
